# Renaissance AI and Education Resource Hub — Compact Index

> 2065 curated evidence-based K-12 and higher education resources.
> Last updated: 2026-06-04

This file lists all entries (title, URL, type, tags) without descriptions.

## Tags

**Topic:** formative-assessment (252), professional-development (246), college-access (219), sel (195), career-readiness (132), personalized-learning (112), open-datasets (102), digital-learning-platforms (76), dropout-prevention (71), inclusive-design (69), attendance (63), writing-instruction (62), prekindergarten (56), student-belonging (37), ai-ethics (27), data-sharing (24), math-strategies (24), ai-policy (21), pii-privacy (19), math-motivation (10), genai-tutoring (4), math-word-problems (2)

**Affiliation:** wwc (366), digital-promise (258), lpi (164), aims (53), jedm (39), edtrust (31), jla (25), campbell-collaboration (20), cmu-learnlab (18), tools-competition (18), lsu (13), northwestern-e4 (10), assistments (9), carnegie-learning (7), rppl (5), khan-academy (5), upgrade-platform (3), norc (2), duolingo (2), nap (2), lastinger-center (1), tla (1), casel (1)
